label: Customer is paying extra
help: Turn on to collect more than the order total across all payment methods. You will choose where the extra goes before submitting.
disabledNoMethods: No payment method on this order allows retained overpayment.
cappedAtRemaining: Capped at remaining ({max}) — customer paying extra? Enable "Customer is paying extra" above.
permissionRequired: You do not have permission to enable paying extra. Required: {permissionName} ({permissionCode}).
cannotDisableWhileExtra: Cannot turn off while an extra amount remains. Reduce payment legs to the order total, or validate and choose where the extra goes.
extraUnresolved: Extra unresolved — validate to choose destination
detailsLockedZeroAmount: Order is fully settled and this method has no amount — details are locked. Enable "Customer is paying extra" above to collect more than the order total.
